---
title: "Organisers"
---

::: {.container-narrow}

## Organising committee

::: {.organiser-card}
### Dario Righelli  
**University of Cambridge / University of Padova**
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
### Cristian Taccioli  
**University of Cambridge / University of Padova**
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
### Pietro Liò  
**University of Cambridge**
:::

:::
